reason_for_decision: The revised article clears the pass threshold with stronger night-operations framing, clearer sensor-boundary logic, and lower promotional drift.
strengths: The article now explains night surveillance as a workflow problem instead of a one-sensor contest.
It states the limits of thermal imaging and radar in a balanced way without flattening their roles.
The procurement framing is more useful because it starts from search, confirmation, and ambiguity rather than from generic preference.
summary_assessment: This version passes because it is clearer, more operationally useful, and more disciplined than the earlier comparison draft.
